---
title: "Sounds & Phonemes"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Sounds & Phonemes
1. Be able to define the following terms: *functional specialization*, *lateralization*, *phoneme*, *phonetic feature*, *contrastive*, *categorical perception*, *speech envelope*, *entrainment*
1. Identify the major brain regions that are involved in processing sounds.
1. Describe the evidence for the following claim: Speech perception is categorical.
1. Describe the evidence for the following claim: The brain represents language sounds in terms of phonetic features.
1. Name one area of current controversy
:::

| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Thurs 9/17 | Sounds & Phonemes | SGN Ch. 3: *Sounds in the Brain* | <span class="blue-badge">Slides ↗</span> | |
| Tues 9/22 | Sounds & Phonemes | Mesgarani et al. 2014 | |
